name: io.github.kimenzo/bento-mcp
description: Official MCP server for Bento API - your encrypted, local and collaborative wiki.

environment_variables.description: JSON string of headers for Bento API. Example: {"Authorization":"Bearer <YOUR_API_KEY>", "Bento-Version":"2025-11-08"}
environment_variables.name: OPENAPI_MCP_HEADERS

environment_variables.description: Optional Bento API base URL. Preferred over the legacy ANYTYPE_API_BASE_URL variable.
environment_variables.name: BENTO_API_BASE_URL
